form.formComment: Returns from a 31-day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 12 at Dubbo Bm82 on March 6 over 1100m, 5 len behind Inazuma Boy carrying 55kg at $11. The run before that 2nd of 10 at Dubbo Bm82 on February 15 over 1200m, 2 len behind Brutal Love carrying 55kg at $41. Finds a few better today. Freshened up and not out of place in this easier race.
